records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well, Miss Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will expect a heart fluttering performance as if waiting for a spring breeze.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will expect a heart fluttering performance as if waiting for a spring breeze.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will expect a heart fluttering performance as if waiting for a spring breeze.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, camera number 3, ready! Camera number 4, ready...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, camera number 3, ready! Camera number 4, ready...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, camera number 3, ready! Camera number 4, ready...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work today, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work today, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work today, Miss Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sponsors are over the moon. I think they're already considering using you as their exclusive model.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sponsors are over the moon. I think they're already considering using you as their exclusive model.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sponsors are over the moon. I think they're already considering using you as their exclusive model.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Manager.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Manager.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Manager.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop making a fuss and tell me my next schedule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop making a fuss and tell me my next schedule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop making a fuss and tell me my next schedule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! Hold on just a moment! Lemme see here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! Hold on just a moment! Lemme see here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! Hold on just a moment! Lemme see here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have a drama filming at 3 o'clock, then a meeting with the director, reviewing the script for the contest...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have a drama filming at 3 o'clock, then a meeting with the director, reviewing the script for the contest...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have a drama filming at 3 o'clock, then a meeting with the director, reviewing the script for the contest...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rearrange all appointments scheduled for after 7 PM.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rearrange all appointments scheduled for after 7 PM.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rearrange all appointments scheduled for after 7 PM.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must head to G Stadium today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must head to G Stadium today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must head to G Stadium today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? G Stadium? Are you going to watch the game?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? G Stadium? Are you going to watch the game?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? G Stadium? Are you going to watch the game?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure? Those stupid reporters might start lumping you with that Wyler again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure? Those stupid reporters might start lumping you with that Wyler again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure? Those stupid reporters might start lumping you with that Wyler again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. I'm used to scandals like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. I'm used to scandals like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. I'm used to scandals like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's somebody else that I really want to meet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's somebody else that I really want to meet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's somebody else that I really want to meet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone you want to meet...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone you want to meet...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone you want to meet...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an important call. Could I have some privacy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an important call. Could I have some privacy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an important call. Could I have some privacy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm working. I remember insisting that we avoid contact as much as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm working. I remember insisting that we avoid contact as much as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm working. I remember insisting that we avoid contact as much as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan, where were you last night?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan, where were you last night?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan, where were you last night?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're suddenly acting like my manager. I believe I sent you my schedule already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're suddenly acting like my manager. I believe I sent you my schedule already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're suddenly acting like my manager. I believe I sent you my schedule already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm aware that you had something in Chamber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm aware that you had something in Chamber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm aware that you had something in Chamber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard there was also a commotion at Chamber which you so happened to be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard there was also a commotion at Chamber which you so happened to be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard there was also a commotion at Chamber which you so happened to be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of commotion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of commotion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of commotion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was a problem with the Grand Dimension Crevice elevator beneath Chamber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was a problem with the Grand Dimension Crevice elevator beneath Chamber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was a problem with the Grand Dimension Crevice elevator beneath Chamber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though there were no casualties, the elevator was out of commission during the power outage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though there were no casualties, the elevator was out of commission during the power outage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though there were no casualties, the elevator was out of commission during the power outage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm relieved to hear that no one was hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm relieved to hear that no one was hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm relieved to hear that no one was hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? I appreciate your worrying for me, but I don't believe we are that close, are we?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? I appreciate your worrying for me, but I don't believe we are that close, are we?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? I appreciate your worrying for me, but I don't believe we are that close, are we?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Don't be mistaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Don't be mistaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Don't be mistaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's strange is that a mysterious paper containing a message was left at the scene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's strange is that a mysterious paper containing a message was left at the scene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's strange is that a mysterious paper containing a message was left at the scene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the third ordeal, for she will become like tin that does not rust.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the third ordeal, for she will become like tin that does not rust.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the third ordeal, for she will become like tin that does not rust.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is what was written. I'm sure you know about this method, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is what was written. I'm sure you know about this method, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is what was written. I'm sure you know about this method, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. So, this is why you contacted me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. So, this is why you contacted me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. So, this is why you contacted me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's only one organization that claims to be a secret society while taking such ostentatious actions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's only one organization that claims to be a secret society while taking such ostentatious actions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's only one organization that claims to be a secret society while taking such ostentatious actions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, I did <color=#ffd34c>stage</color> it like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, I did <color=#ffd34c>stage</color> it like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, I did <color=#ffd34c>stage</color> it like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. In truth, this isn't information known to the public.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. In truth, this isn't information known to the public.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. In truth, this isn't information known to the public.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's investigation team believes it is the work of Six Wings considering the previous cases.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's investigation team believes it is the work of Six Wings considering the previous cases.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's investigation team believes it is the work of Six Wings considering the previous cases.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a trap that took advantage of biased thinking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a trap that took advantage of biased thinking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a trap that took advantage of biased thinking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>A message is left behind wherever Six Wings' actions are sighted.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>A message is left behind wherever Six Wings' actions are sighted.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>A message is left behind wherever Six Wings' actions are sighted.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: By staging it as such, it was possible to hide the member's whereabouts in critical situations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By staging it as such, it was possible to hide the member's whereabouts in critical situations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By staging it as such, it was possible to hide the member's whereabouts in critical situations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm aware that your role in infiltrating Six Wings was to collect and conceal information.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm aware that your role in infiltrating Six Wings was to collect and conceal information.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm aware that your role in infiltrating Six Wings was to collect and conceal information.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, why did Six Wings leave a message behind this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, why did Six Wings leave a message behind this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, why did Six Wings leave a message behind this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have any idea why they targeted Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice elevator?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have any idea why they targeted Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice elevator?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have any idea why they targeted Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice elevator?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, as I've told you already, I don't know much about Six Wings' ultimate goal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, as I've told you already, I don't know much about Six Wings' ultimate goal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, as I've told you already, I don't know much about Six Wings' ultimate goal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe the same goes for the other members as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe the same goes for the other members as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe the same goes for the other members as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one in Six Wings completely understands Na Yubin's true intentions except him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one in Six Wings completely understands Na Yubin's true intentions except him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one in Six Wings completely understands Na Yubin's true intentions except him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But one thing is clear. They will use any means and ends for the greater good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But one thing is clear. They will use any means and ends for the greater good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But one thing is clear. They will use any means and ends for the greater good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll change my question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll change my question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll change my question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what do the messages that you left behind mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what do the messages that you left behind mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what do the messages that you left behind mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you guess anything from this message?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you guess anything from this message?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you guess anything from this message?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Richard Werner
records.m_Talk_DEU: Richard Werner
records.m_Talk_FRA: Richard Werner

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you doubting me right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you doubting me right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you doubting me right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm merely asking to confirm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm merely asking to confirm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm merely asking to confirm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, an incident that is presumed to be the actions of Six Wings happened at the time you were there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, an incident that is presumed to be the actions of Six Wings happened at the time you were there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, an incident that is presumed to be the actions of Six Wings happened at the time you were there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I don't think it's strange to ask for advice from someone who infiltrated Six Wings, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I don't think it's strange to ask for advice from someone who infiltrated Six Wings, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I don't think it's strange to ask for advice from someone who infiltrated Six Wings, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm grateful that you gave me an identity several years ago when I was just an Exile.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm grateful that you gave me an identity several years ago when I was just an Exile.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm grateful that you gave me an identity several years ago when I was just an Exile.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, I believe that debt has been fully repaid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, I believe that debt has been fully repaid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, I believe that debt has been fully repaid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you heard while interrogating Firstwing, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you heard while interrogating Firstwing, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you heard while interrogating Firstwing, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: since I have betrayed them already, they will continue to come after me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: since I have betrayed them already, they will continue to come after me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: since I have betrayed them already, they will continue to come after me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason I'm able to stay safe is because I hide behind the name of a famous actress.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason I'm able to stay safe is because I hide behind the name of a famous actress.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason I'm able to stay safe is because I hide behind the name of a famous actress.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, wealth and fame are but a mere fleeting moment in Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, wealth and fame are but a mere fleeting moment in Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, wealth and fame are but a mere fleeting moment in Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you know this better than I do, right? As a Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you know this better than I do, right? As a Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you know this better than I do, right? As a Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize for unintentionally asking you a rude question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize for unintentionally asking you a rude question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize for unintentionally asking you a rude question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one thing I can tell you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one thing I can tell you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one thing I can tell you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no special meaning behind that message.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no special meaning behind that message.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no special meaning behind that message.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leaving a public message was an important trap for attracting attention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leaving a public message was an important trap for attracting attention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leaving a public message was an important trap for attracting attention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least, that was the case when I left them. I don't know what it means now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least, that was the case when I left them. I don't know what it means now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least, that was the case when I left them. I don't know what it means now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll hang up now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll hang up now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll hang up now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan Claire...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan Claire...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan Claire...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is she an ally or the enemy...? Can I trust her or not...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is she an ally or the enemy...? Can I trust her or not...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is she an ally or the enemy...? Can I trust her or not...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't figure out this woman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't figure out this woman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't figure out this woman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However... there's no harm in being careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However... there's no harm in being careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However... there's no harm in being careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, sir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, sir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, sir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get me everything on Swan Claire's schedule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get me everything on Swan Claire's schedule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get me everything on Swan Claire's schedule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan Claire? The actress Swan Claire?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan Claire? The actress Swan Claire?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan Claire? The actress Swan Claire?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Don't ask questions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Don't ask questions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Don't ask questions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you find anything odd or she acts suspiciously, report to me immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you find anything odd or she acts suspiciously, report to me immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you find anything odd or she acts suspiciously, report to me immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are doubting me, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are doubting me, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are doubting me, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But your role is to be a loyal soldier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But your role is to be a loyal soldier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But your role is to be a loyal soldier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And soldiers are bound by procedures and rules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And soldiers are bound by procedures and rules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And soldiers are bound by procedures and rules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look. You are absent from this city following a useless rule on prisoner transfers, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look. You are absent from this city following a useless rule on prisoner transfers, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look. You are absent from this city following a useless rule on prisoner transfers, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So when you do realize something, the story will have already reached an irreversible point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So when you do realize something, the story will have already reached an irreversible point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So when you do realize something, the story will have already reached an irreversible point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Richard Werner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Richard Werner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Richard Werner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There! Take her photo, now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There! Take her photo, now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There! Take her photo, now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, coming through! I'm a reporter! Move aside, please!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, coming through! I'm a reporter! Move aside, please!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, coming through! I'm a reporter! Move aside, please!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on? Are they here to take pictures of us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on? Are they here to take pictures of us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on? Are they here to take pictures of us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the looks of it, they don't care who we are. They are all off towards that direction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the looks of it, they don't care who we are. They are all off towards that direction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the looks of it, they don't care who we are. They are all off towards that direction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe someone famous has come to see the match! Let's go take a peek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe someone famous has come to see the match! Let's go take a peek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe someone famous has come to see the match! Let's go take a peek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it might be the President of Alphatrix?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it might be the President of Alphatrix?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it might be the President of Alphatrix?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think she's got time to come all this way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think she's got time to come all this way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think she's got time to come all this way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look there! The reporters are all gathered over there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look there! The reporters are all gathered over there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look there! The reporters are all gathered over there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan! Please tell us about your newest movie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan! Please tell us about your newest movie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan! Please tell us about your newest movie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have anything to say about the scandal between you and the Gauntlet player who was recently in court?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have anything to say about the scandal between you and the Gauntlet player who was recently in court?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have anything to say about the scandal between you and the Gauntlet player who was recently in court?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't attend the award ceremony for this year's leading female actress. Why was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't attend the award ceremony for this year's leading female actress. Why was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't attend the award ceremony for this year's leading female actress. Why was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle Wright.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle Wright.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle Wright.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've met a new person on a new stage with a new role.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've met a new person on a new stage with a new role.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've met a new person on a new stage with a new role.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That person is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That person is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That person is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her wounds from the Qliphoth Game still haven't fully healed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her wounds from the Qliphoth Game still haven't fully healed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her wounds from the Qliphoth Game still haven't fully healed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sole survivor of the Northern Union's space expedition...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sole survivor of the Northern Union's space expedition...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sole survivor of the Northern Union's space expedition...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Code name, Kudryavka.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Code name, Kudryavka.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Code name, Kudryavka.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the child from the Charade scandal witness stand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the child from the Charade scandal witness stand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the child from the Charade scandal witness stand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The owner of Cold Case No. 88, Zoom Lens. Louis959 Laurencin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The owner of Cold Case No. 88, Zoom Lens. Louis959 Laurencin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The owner of Cold Case No. 88, Zoom Lens. Louis959 Laurencin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The woman the wicked Gauntlet player Wyler is obsessed with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The woman the wicked Gauntlet player Wyler is obsessed with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The woman the wicked Gauntlet player Wyler is obsessed with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Her name is Malena Skinner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Her name is Malena Skinner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Her name is Malena Skinner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The most fearful thing in the world is not knowing what you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The most fearful thing in the world is not knowing what you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The most fearful thing in the world is not knowing what you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan! Why are you smiling? Is it related to the question I asked?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan! Why are you smiling? Is it related to the question I asked?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan! Why are you smiling? Is it related to the question I asked?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, aren't those people over there playing for the qualifiers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, aren't those people over there playing for the qualifiers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, aren't those people over there playing for the qualifiers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You there, mister! What is your relationship with Swan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You there, mister! What is your relationship with Swan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You there, mister! What is your relationship with Swan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I now see what I want. Clearly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I now see what I want. Clearly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I now see what I want. Clearly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the only way to revert all the stories to their beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the only way to revert all the stories to their beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the only way to revert all the stories to their beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're running away! Get them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're running away! Get them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're running away! Get them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan, why did you come to see today's match?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan, why did you come to see today's match?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan, why did you come to see today's match?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a team you're rooting for? Were you always interested in the Gauntlet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a team you're rooting for? Were you always interested in the Gauntlet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a team you're rooting for? Were you always interested in the Gauntlet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Not really.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not really.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not really.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've taken an interest just now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've taken an interest just now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've taken an interest just now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well, Miss Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will expect a heart fluttering performance as if waiting for a spring breeze.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will expect a heart fluttering performance as if waiting for a spring breeze.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will expect a heart fluttering performance as if waiting for a spring breeze.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, camera number 3, ready! Camera number 4, ready...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, camera number 3, ready! Camera number 4, ready...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, camera number 3, ready! Camera number 4, ready...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Great work today, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Great work today, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Great work today, Miss Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sponsors are over the moon. I think they're already considering using you as their exclusive model.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sponsors are over the moon. I think they're already considering using you as their exclusive model.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sponsors are over the moon. I think they're already considering using you as their exclusive model.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Manager.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Manager.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Manager.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop making a fuss and tell me my next schedule.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop making a fuss and tell me my next schedule.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop making a fuss and tell me my next schedule.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! Hold on just a moment! Lemme see here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! Hold on just a moment! Lemme see here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! Hold on just a moment! Lemme see here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have a drama filming at 3 o'clock, then a meeting with the director, reviewing the script for the contest...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have a drama filming at 3 o'clock, then a meeting with the director, reviewing the script for the contest...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have a drama filming at 3 o'clock, then a meeting with the director, reviewing the script for the contest...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rearrange all appointments scheduled for after 7 PM.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rearrange all appointments scheduled for after 7 PM.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rearrange all appointments scheduled for after 7 PM.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must head to G Stadium today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must head to G Stadium today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must head to G Stadium today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? G Stadium? Are you going to watch the game?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? G Stadium? Are you going to watch the game?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? G Stadium? Are you going to watch the game?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure? Those stupid reporters might start lumping you with that Wyler again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure? Those stupid reporters might start lumping you with that Wyler again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure? Those stupid reporters might start lumping you with that Wyler again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. I'm used to scandals like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. I'm used to scandals like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. I'm used to scandals like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's somebody else that I really want to meet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's somebody else that I really want to meet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's somebody else that I really want to meet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone you want to meet...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone you want to meet...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone you want to meet...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an important call. Could I have some privacy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an important call. Could I have some privacy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an important call. Could I have some privacy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm working. I remember insisting that we avoid contact as much as possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm working. I remember insisting that we avoid contact as much as possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm working. I remember insisting that we avoid contact as much as possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan, where were you last night?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan, where were you last night?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan, where were you last night?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're suddenly acting like my manager. I believe I sent you my schedule already.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're suddenly acting like my manager. I believe I sent you my schedule already.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're suddenly acting like my manager. I believe I sent you my schedule already.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm aware that you had something in Chamber.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm aware that you had something in Chamber.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm aware that you had something in Chamber.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard there was also a commotion at Chamber which you so happened to be.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard there was also a commotion at Chamber which you so happened to be.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard there was also a commotion at Chamber which you so happened to be.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of commotion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of commotion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of commotion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There was a problem with the Grand Dimension Crevice elevator beneath Chamber.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There was a problem with the Grand Dimension Crevice elevator beneath Chamber.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was a problem with the Grand Dimension Crevice elevator beneath Chamber.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though there were no casualties, the elevator was out of commission during the power outage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though there were no casualties, the elevator was out of commission during the power outage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though there were no casualties, the elevator was out of commission during the power outage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm relieved to hear that no one was hurt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm relieved to hear that no one was hurt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm relieved to hear that no one was hurt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? I appreciate your worrying for me, but I don't believe we are that close, are we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? I appreciate your worrying for me, but I don't believe we are that close, are we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? I appreciate your worrying for me, but I don't believe we are that close, are we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Don't be mistaken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Don't be mistaken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Don't be mistaken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's strange is that a mysterious paper containing a message was left at the scene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's strange is that a mysterious paper containing a message was left at the scene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's strange is that a mysterious paper containing a message was left at the scene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the third ordeal, for she will become like tin that does not rust.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the third ordeal, for she will become like tin that does not rust.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the third ordeal, for she will become like tin that does not rust.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is what was written. I'm sure you know about this method, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is what was written. I'm sure you know about this method, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is what was written. I'm sure you know about this method, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. So, this is why you contacted me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. So, this is why you contacted me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. So, this is why you contacted me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's only one organization that claims to be a secret society while taking such ostentatious actions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's only one organization that claims to be a secret society while taking such ostentatious actions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's only one organization that claims to be a secret society while taking such ostentatious actions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, I did <color=#ffd34c>stage</color> it like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, I did <color=#ffd34c>stage</color> it like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, I did <color=#ffd34c>stage</color> it like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. In truth, this isn't information known to the public.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. In truth, this isn't information known to the public.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. In truth, this isn't information known to the public.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's investigation team believes it is the work of Six Wings considering the previous cases.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's investigation team believes it is the work of Six Wings considering the previous cases.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's investigation team believes it is the work of Six Wings considering the previous cases.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a trap that took advantage of biased thinking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a trap that took advantage of biased thinking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a trap that took advantage of biased thinking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>A message is left behind wherever Six Wings' actions are sighted.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>A message is left behind wherever Six Wings' actions are sighted.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>A message is left behind wherever Six Wings' actions are sighted.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: By staging it as such, it was possible to hide the member's whereabouts in critical situations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By staging it as such, it was possible to hide the member's whereabouts in critical situations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By staging it as such, it was possible to hide the member's whereabouts in critical situations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm aware that your role in infiltrating Six Wings was to collect and conceal information.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm aware that your role in infiltrating Six Wings was to collect and conceal information.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm aware that your role in infiltrating Six Wings was to collect and conceal information.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, why did Six Wings leave a message behind this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, why did Six Wings leave a message behind this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, why did Six Wings leave a message behind this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have any idea why they targeted Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice elevator?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have any idea why they targeted Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice elevator?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have any idea why they targeted Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice elevator?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, as I've told you already, I don't know much about Six Wings' ultimate goal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, as I've told you already, I don't know much about Six Wings' ultimate goal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, as I've told you already, I don't know much about Six Wings' ultimate goal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe the same goes for the other members as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe the same goes for the other members as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe the same goes for the other members as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No one in Six Wings completely understands Na Yubin's true intentions except him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No one in Six Wings completely understands Na Yubin's true intentions except him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No one in Six Wings completely understands Na Yubin's true intentions except him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But one thing is clear. They will use any means and ends for the greater good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But one thing is clear. They will use any means and ends for the greater good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But one thing is clear. They will use any means and ends for the greater good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll change my question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll change my question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll change my question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what do the messages that you left behind mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what do the messages that you left behind mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what do the messages that you left behind mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you guess anything from this message?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you guess anything from this message?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you guess anything from this message?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Richard Werner
root.m_Talk_DEU: Richard Werner
root.m_Talk_FRA: Richard Werner

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you doubting me right now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you doubting me right now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you doubting me right now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm merely asking to confirm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm merely asking to confirm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm merely asking to confirm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, an incident that is presumed to be the actions of Six Wings happened at the time you were there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, an incident that is presumed to be the actions of Six Wings happened at the time you were there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, an incident that is presumed to be the actions of Six Wings happened at the time you were there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I don't think it's strange to ask for advice from someone who infiltrated Six Wings, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I don't think it's strange to ask for advice from someone who infiltrated Six Wings, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I don't think it's strange to ask for advice from someone who infiltrated Six Wings, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm grateful that you gave me an identity several years ago when I was just an Exile.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm grateful that you gave me an identity several years ago when I was just an Exile.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm grateful that you gave me an identity several years ago when I was just an Exile.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, I believe that debt has been fully repaid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, I believe that debt has been fully repaid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, I believe that debt has been fully repaid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you heard while interrogating Firstwing, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you heard while interrogating Firstwing, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you heard while interrogating Firstwing, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: since I have betrayed them already, they will continue to come after me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: since I have betrayed them already, they will continue to come after me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: since I have betrayed them already, they will continue to come after me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason I'm able to stay safe is because I hide behind the name of a famous actress.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason I'm able to stay safe is because I hide behind the name of a famous actress.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason I'm able to stay safe is because I hide behind the name of a famous actress.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, wealth and fame are but a mere fleeting moment in Charade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, wealth and fame are but a mere fleeting moment in Charade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, wealth and fame are but a mere fleeting moment in Charade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you know this better than I do, right? As a Senior?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you know this better than I do, right? As a Senior?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you know this better than I do, right? As a Senior?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Very well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Very well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize for unintentionally asking you a rude question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize for unintentionally asking you a rude question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize for unintentionally asking you a rude question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one thing I can tell you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one thing I can tell you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one thing I can tell you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no special meaning behind that message.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no special meaning behind that message.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no special meaning behind that message.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leaving a public message was an important trap for attracting attention.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leaving a public message was an important trap for attracting attention.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leaving a public message was an important trap for attracting attention.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least, that was the case when I left them. I don't know what it means now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least, that was the case when I left them. I don't know what it means now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least, that was the case when I left them. I don't know what it means now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll hang up now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll hang up now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll hang up now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan Claire...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan Claire...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan Claire...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is she an ally or the enemy...? Can I trust her or not...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is she an ally or the enemy...? Can I trust her or not...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is she an ally or the enemy...? Can I trust her or not...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't figure out this woman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't figure out this woman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't figure out this woman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However... there's no harm in being careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However... there's no harm in being careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However... there's no harm in being careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, sir?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, sir?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, sir?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get me everything on Swan Claire's schedule.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get me everything on Swan Claire's schedule.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get me everything on Swan Claire's schedule.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan Claire? The actress Swan Claire?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan Claire? The actress Swan Claire?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan Claire? The actress Swan Claire?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Don't ask questions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Don't ask questions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Don't ask questions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you find anything odd or she acts suspiciously, report to me immediately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you find anything odd or she acts suspiciously, report to me immediately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you find anything odd or she acts suspiciously, report to me immediately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are doubting me, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are doubting me, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are doubting me, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But your role is to be a loyal soldier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But your role is to be a loyal soldier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But your role is to be a loyal soldier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And soldiers are bound by procedures and rules.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And soldiers are bound by procedures and rules.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And soldiers are bound by procedures and rules.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look. You are absent from this city following a useless rule on prisoner transfers, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look. You are absent from this city following a useless rule on prisoner transfers, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look. You are absent from this city following a useless rule on prisoner transfers, aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So when you do realize something, the story will have already reached an irreversible point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So when you do realize something, the story will have already reached an irreversible point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So when you do realize something, the story will have already reached an irreversible point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Richard Werner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Richard Werner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Richard Werner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There! Take her photo, now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There! Take her photo, now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There! Take her photo, now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, coming through! I'm a reporter! Move aside, please!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, coming through! I'm a reporter! Move aside, please!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, coming through! I'm a reporter! Move aside, please!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on? Are they here to take pictures of us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on? Are they here to take pictures of us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on? Are they here to take pictures of us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: From the looks of it, they don't care who we are. They are all off towards that direction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From the looks of it, they don't care who we are. They are all off towards that direction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From the looks of it, they don't care who we are. They are all off towards that direction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe someone famous has come to see the match! Let's go take a peek!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe someone famous has come to see the match! Let's go take a peek!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe someone famous has come to see the match! Let's go take a peek!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it might be the President of Alphatrix?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it might be the President of Alphatrix?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it might be the President of Alphatrix?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think she's got time to come all this way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think she's got time to come all this way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think she's got time to come all this way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look there! The reporters are all gathered over there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look there! The reporters are all gathered over there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look there! The reporters are all gathered over there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan! Please tell us about your newest movie!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan! Please tell us about your newest movie!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan! Please tell us about your newest movie!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have anything to say about the scandal between you and the Gauntlet player who was recently in court?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have anything to say about the scandal between you and the Gauntlet player who was recently in court?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have anything to say about the scandal between you and the Gauntlet player who was recently in court?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't attend the award ceremony for this year's leading female actress. Why was that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't attend the award ceremony for this year's leading female actress. Why was that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't attend the award ceremony for this year's leading female actress. Why was that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle Wright.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle Wright.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle Wright.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've met a new person on a new stage with a new role.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've met a new person on a new stage with a new role.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've met a new person on a new stage with a new role.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That person is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That person is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That person is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: the Wolf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: the Wolf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: the Wolf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her wounds from the Qliphoth Game still haven't fully healed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her wounds from the Qliphoth Game still haven't fully healed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her wounds from the Qliphoth Game still haven't fully healed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sole survivor of the Northern Union's space expedition...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sole survivor of the Northern Union's space expedition...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sole survivor of the Northern Union's space expedition...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Code name, Kudryavka.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Code name, Kudryavka.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Code name, Kudryavka.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the child from the Charade scandal witness stand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the child from the Charade scandal witness stand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the child from the Charade scandal witness stand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The owner of Cold Case No. 88, Zoom Lens. Louis959 Laurencin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The owner of Cold Case No. 88, Zoom Lens. Louis959 Laurencin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The owner of Cold Case No. 88, Zoom Lens. Louis959 Laurencin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The woman the wicked Gauntlet player Wyler is obsessed with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The woman the wicked Gauntlet player Wyler is obsessed with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The woman the wicked Gauntlet player Wyler is obsessed with.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Her name is Malena Skinner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Her name is Malena Skinner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Her name is Malena Skinner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Remember, Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Remember, Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Remember, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The most fearful thing in the world is not knowing what you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The most fearful thing in the world is not knowing what you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The most fearful thing in the world is not knowing what you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan! Why are you smiling? Is it related to the question I asked?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan! Why are you smiling? Is it related to the question I asked?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan! Why are you smiling? Is it related to the question I asked?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, aren't those people over there playing for the qualifiers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, aren't those people over there playing for the qualifiers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, aren't those people over there playing for the qualifiers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You there, mister! What is your relationship with Swan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You there, mister! What is your relationship with Swan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You there, mister! What is your relationship with Swan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I now see what I want. Clearly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I now see what I want. Clearly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I now see what I want. Clearly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the only way to revert all the stories to their beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the only way to revert all the stories to their beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the only way to revert all the stories to their beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're running away! Get them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're running away! Get them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're running away! Get them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan, why did you come to see today's match?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan, why did you come to see today's match?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan, why did you come to see today's match?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a team you're rooting for? Were you always interested in the Gauntlet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a team you're rooting for? Were you always interested in the Gauntlet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a team you're rooting for? Were you always interested in the Gauntlet?

root.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not really.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not really.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However...

root.m_Talk_FRA: However...
